metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skill suite and CLI toolset. Routes tasks to the right specialist.

plugins.name: agentfiles
plugins.description: 54 curated skills (executor, manager, specialists for coding/research/planning), 10 subagents, and session hooks (caveman mode, safety gate, skill logger, notify). Requires the 'af' CLI on PATH for full functionality (install via 'uv tool install -e tools/python/').
